== name in kana (P1814) == * ことしろぬしじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5480005003210 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県阿波市市場町伊月字宮ノ本100-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:事代主神社 (阿波市)]] {{wikidata link|Q48758503}} == Japanese content == {{脚注の不足|date=2022-12}} {{神社 |名称= Kotoshironushi Shrine |画像= [[File:Kotoshironushi Shrine, Awa City.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Awa|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Izuki|Q55523753|qid=Q55523753|1=Ichiba-chō Izuki}} Aza Miyanomoto 100-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former district shrine|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}} |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=事代主神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kotoshironushi Shrine''' (ことしろぬしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Izuki|Q55523753|qid=Q55523753|1=Ichiba-chō Izuki}}, {{ill|lt=Awa|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is popularly called "Obbe-san." The precinct is maintained as '''Izuki Rural Park'''. === History === The founding year is unknown. One tradition says that descendants of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takeomi|1=UNKNOWN}}, maternal grandfather of {{ill|lt=Emperor Annei|Q313345|qid=Q313345|1=Emperor Annei}}, led the {{ill|lt=Izumo clan|Q22123990|qid=Q22123990|1=Izumo zoku}} to Izuki in {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} and enshrined their ancestral deity {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} together with ancestress {{ill|lt=Isuzuyori-hime no Mikoto|Q10881557|qid=Q10881557|1=Isuzuyori-hime}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called Kotoji Myōjin or Kotoji Daimyōjin. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} === Subsidiary shrines === * Chinju Shrine * Moroshiki no Kami * Ōzumi Daimyōjin === Access === * About 15 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tsuchinari Interchange|Q10927770|qid=Q10927770|1=Donari interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|qid=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|qid=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:阿波市の歴史]] [[Category:阿波市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]]

{{wikidata link|Q48758503}} == Japanese content == {{脚注の不足|date=2022-12}} {{神社 |名称= Kotoshironushi Shrine |画像= [[File:Kotoshironushi Shrine, Awa City.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Awa|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Izuki|Q55523753|qid=Q55523753|1=Ichiba-chō Izuki}} Aza Miyanomoto 100-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former district shrine|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}} |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=事代主神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kotoshironushi Shrine''' (ことしろぬしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ichiba-chō Izuki|Q55523753|qid=Q55523753|1=Ichiba-chō Izuki}}, {{ill|lt=Awa|Q791587|qid=Q791587|1=Awa, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is popularly called "Obbe-san." The precinct is maintained as '''Izuki Rural Park'''. === History === The founding year is unknown. One tradition says that descendants of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takeomi|1=UNKNOWN}}, maternal grandfather of {{ill|lt=Emperor Annei|Q313345|qid=Q313345|1=Emperor Annei}}, led the {{ill|lt=Izumo clan|Q22123990|qid=Q22123990|1=Izumo zoku}} to Izuki in {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} and enshrined their ancestral deity {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} together with ancestress {{ill|lt=Isuzuyori-hime no Mikoto|Q10881557|qid=Q10881557|1=Isuzuyori-hime}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called Kotoji Myōjin or Kotoji Daimyōjin. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} === Subsidiary shrines === * Chinju Shrine * Moroshiki no Kami * Ōzumi Daimyōjin === Access === * About 15 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tsuchinari Interchange|Q10927770|qid=Q10927770|1=Donari interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|qid=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|qid=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Q48758503)]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:阿波市の歴史]] [[Category:阿波市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]]
